summary: AI referral intake and call handling for specialty practices.
editor_note: Healthcare AI usually chases clinicians; this aims at the fax pile between referral and visit. Basata processes faxes, creates EHR charts, calls patients with voice agents, and claims 500,000 referrals processed with 100,000 in the last month. Unlike ambient scribes, the bet is owning the handoff before care starts. The risk is how much specialty-specific workflow knowledge has to be rebuilt practice by practice.
investors: Basis Set Ventures, Cowboy Ventures, Sofeon

product_evidence.claim: Official product positioning describes Basata: AI referral intake and call handling for specialty practices.
Basata processes faxes, creates EHR charts, calls patients with voice agents, and claims 500,000 referrals processed with 100,000 in the last month.

market_context.primary_user: Healthcare, benefits, or life-sciences teams evaluating regulated operational workflows.
market_context.why_now: Recent source-backed funding and public product evidence make healthcare ai, referrals, voice agents worth tracking.

risks.claim: The risk is how much specialty-specific workflow knowledge has to be rebuilt practice by practice.
risks.basis: VentureDex editorial assessment based on official product evidence and funding-source review.
